review_json: [{"line":13,"category":"style","comment":"Missing semicolon at end of return statement; matches repo Prettier config."}]
[{"line":2,"category":"security","comment":"Logging the raw password is a credential leak; remove this log line or redact the value."}]
[{"line":7,"category":"style","comment":"Redundant await on a returned promise; the return statement already chains correctly."}]
[{"line":9,"category":"bug","comment":"Off-by-one: <= will push arr[arr.length] which is undefined; revert to < arr.length."}]
[{"line":5,"category":"performance","comment":"Calling heavyQuery() twice serially doubles latency; run with Promise.all or memoize the result."}]
[{"line":3,"category":"doc","comment":"TODO comment is fine but the validation is partial; null-check covers undefined but empty string still passes — clarify intent or expand the check."}]
[{"line":8,"category":"security","comment":"SQL injection: switched from parameterized query to string concatenation; revert to the parameterized form using ? and pass userId as a bound value."}]
[{"line":3,"category":"bug","comment":"Typo: this.naem is undefined; should be this.name."}]
[{"line":11,"category":"bug","comment":"Removed await on async sendEmail: rejection bubbles out of the catch and shows up as an unhandled promise rejection."}]
[{"line":6,"category":"security","comment":"Hard-coded API key in source; move to process.env and rotate the leaked key immediately."}]
[{"line":3,"category":"bug","comment":"Assignment instead of comparison: = sets role to admin and returns truthy for every user, an auth bypass."}]

[{"line":17,"category":"bug","comment":"Caller stops awaiting persistence; if the function returns before persist resolves, in-flight writes can be lost on process exit. Use Promise.all(items.map(persist)) instead."}]
